mano_cua.result_summary: 创建多边形后拖拽出地图边界并释放，地图 pan/drag 和 zoom 均正常工作，交互功能未被锁定。但拖拽出边界时浏览器触发了文本选择模式（页面文字被高亮），属于轻微事件处理问题。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Excellent! The zoom out worked perfectly! The map has zoomed out and I can now see more of the map area including Ranelagh Gardens, Chelsea Gate, Chelsea Bridge Road and other details. All the shapes (polygons, circles, etc.) are visible on the map.
